source_title: Random Amplified Polymorphic DNA Variation among Populations of the Insular Endemic Plant Campanula microdonta (Campanulaceae)
comparison_scope: nine populations across Izu Islands; no mainland-to-island floral trait comparison
verified_finding: Within-population RAPD diversity did not correlate with distance from the Japanese mainland; clustering suggested one colonization per island except possible multiple immigration to Miyake.
required_next_check: Recover full population/locality table before matching genetic history to floral populations.

source_title: Floral differentiation among insular and mainland populations of Weigela coraeensis (Caprifoliaceae)
comparison_scope: explicit insular-mainland floral differentiation in title
verified_from: Crossref metadata and manual title screen
verified_finding: Direct floral geographic comparison candidate; trait values and population units not yet verified.
required_next_check: Obtain full text; extract trait definitions, population/locality units, n, SD/SE and any common-garden context.

source_title: Impact of geographical isolation on genetic differentiation in insular and mainland populations of Weigela coraeensis (Caprifoliaceae) on Honshu and the Izu Islands
comparison_scope: insular-mainland genetic differentiation across Honshu and Izu
verified_from: Crossref metadata and manual title screen
verified_finding: Potential geographic-history covariate; not a floral effect.
required_next_check: Recover sampling map and align population IDs with the 2010 floral study before sensitivity analysis.

source_title: Floral morphology and pollinator fauna characteristics of island and mainland populations of Ligustrum ovalifolium (Oleaceae)
comparison_scope: mainland Honshu versus Izu Islands; Hachijo explicitly identified as most isolated endpoint
verified_finding: Corolla tube and stamen lengths were shorter on Izu than mainland relatives and the shortening was more pronounced on Hachijo; Hachijo pollinator fauna differed significantly from mainland Honshu and other Izu Islands.
required_next_check: Obtain full text; extract locality-wise trait values, n, variance, pollinator sampling effort and exact tests before numeric effect extraction.
